reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
blocking_reasons: The original B04.R5 proof and the first same-head counted rerun both held the static router baseline honestly because superiority was not earned.
The refreshed lab readiness packet justifies authorizing one more counted same-head rerun only; it does not itself earn superiority.
R6 remains blocked because router superiority has still not been re-earned on the counted lane.
